meta.notes: Swiss household electricity tariff — ElCom reference profile H4 (~4,500 kWh/yr), basic/standard supply (Grundversorgung) — from the Federal Electricity Commission (ElCom) via LINDAS (lindas.admin.ch). opendata.swiss "Open use" (terms_open); ElCom attributed as a courtesy. All-in 29.98 Rp/kWh = energy 10.95 + grid 15.13 + federal grid surcharge 2.30 + community/cantonal taxes; annual fixed 144 CHF. Serves 1 municipality. Period 2026.
